falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (key resistance level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a trend reversal rather than consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: Bitcoin's 30-day trading volume exceeds 200% of its 2023 average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would demonstrate extreme market participation, invalidating the current low-conviction HOLD position

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 12 for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate extreme market complacency and low volatility, directly contradicting the blowoff score of 40 which suggests higher volatility expectations

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
